notation: TOE > SAME IN/OUT [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL]
description: Circle the footbag in between toe delays. Either in to out or out to in. (Both directions are worth the same amount of adds).

notation: CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
description: Delay the footbag on the inside surface of the foot with the catching leg tucked behind the support leg. Bend the support leg deeply and lean slightly over this leg for balance.

notation: CLIP > OP OUT [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
TOE > SAME OUT [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
description: From a toe delay- circle the footbag from out to in and catch on the toe of the support leg.

notation: SET > OP OUT [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
description: From a toe or a clipper delay, set the bag straight up about waist high. As you plant your set leg, bring your support leg up and over the bag from out to in (a reverse miraging motion). Plant the dexterity leg and catch the bag on the toe of the setting foot.

notation: SET > OP OUT [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL]
description: Pass the support leg over the footbag and catch on a delay. E.g., from a left toe stall, hop off the right leg and bring it over the top of the footbag and catch it on a right toe delay.

notation: SET > OP IN [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
description: From a toe delay or a clipper delay, set the bag straight up, and swing the support leg from in to out over the footbag, catching it with the setting leg on a toe delay. The set from a clipper delay is easier once you know how to do a clipper. Note: with a toe-set mirage, the support leg has to first swing under, then back over the bag!

notation: SET > OP IN [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL]
TOE > SAME IN [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
description: From a toe delay- circle the footbag from in to out and catch on the toe of the support leg.

notation: SET > OP IN [DEX] > SAME IN [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
description: A double dexterity mirage. Set from either clipper or toe, then quickly plant the setting leg and bring the support leg over the bag from in to out then over again to land to support a toe delay with the original setting foot.

notation: SET > SAME or OP OUT [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
description: A leg over straight to a clipper delay. E.g., from a right toe set the footbag up and slightly towards yourself. Hop off your right leg and pass your left leg over the footbag- delay the footbag with the inside surface of the right foot in a cross body position ie a clipper delay.

notation: SET > JUMP [BOD] > SAME or OP OUT [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD]
description: A leg over straight to a flying clipper. E.g., from a right toe delay, set the footbag straight up and slightly towards yourself. Hop off the right leg and pass the left leg over the footbag- Hit the footbag with the inside surface of the right foot and then in this case it is easiest to land on the left leg.

notation: SET > FLAP [UNS] [XBD] [DEL]
description: A cross body sole delay. It is easiest to get a flat surface if you point you knee straight down.

notation: TOE > SAME IN [DEX] > SAME IN [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL]orTOE > SAME OUT [DEX] > SAME OUT [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL]
description: Circle the footbag twice between toe delays. Pointing your toes down will prevent the circling leg from snagging the footbag as you come around for the second time.

notation: SET > OP IN [DEX] > OP OUT [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL]
description: A leg over straight after a mirage. The mirage can be set either from a clipper or a toe delay. From the set hop off the support leg then the setting leg and pass both over the footbag and finally catch the footbag with the setting foot on a toe delay.

notation: CLIP > OP IN [DEX] > SAME IN [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL]
description: Basically an in to out double around the world set from a clipper delay. E.g., from a left clipper delay, set the bag just above waist height. Quickly plant the left leg and circle the footbag from in to out twice landing on right toe delay.

notation: SET > OP OUT [DEX] > SAME OUT [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL]
description: A double dexterity legover. E.g., from a left toe delay, hop off the right leg and circle the footbag from out to in twice ending on a right toe delay.

notation: SET > OP IN [DEX] > SAME CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
description: A miraging clipper delay. From a clipper- quickly plant the setting leg and bring the support leg over the bag from in to out and in one motion- keeping this leg close to the other leg- into a clipper delay on the other side. Or, setting from left toe, quickly plant the left leg and bring the right leg up and around the bag from in to out. Turn slightly in the direction of the dexterity (in this case, to the right) to help bring the right foot back around into the cross body position to end the move on a right foot clipper delay.

notation: SET > (jump) [BOD] > SAME or OP INSIDE [DEL] > OP OUT [DEX] > (land)
description: A hop-over performed in the air. Jump and imediately initiate an inside delay. Bring the jumping leg over the delaying leg and back down to the ground end in a clipper delay.

notation: SET > (back or front) SPIN [BOD] > SAME or OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
description: Spin into a clipper delay. It is easiest to set this from a clipper stall on the other foot or from a toe delay with the other foot, straight in front of you (not behind you). E.g., from a right toe set, set straight in front of you, about waist high, and turn to the left so the footbag passes behind your back... Keep your head down with your eyes on the footbag until just before it lands on the inside surface of your right foot. Then turn quickly to the left (counterclockwise) and catch the footbag on a clipper delay.

notation: CLIP > SAME OUT [DEX] > SAME OUT [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL].
SET > OP INSIDE [DEL] > OP OUT [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD]
description: Start by inside delaying the footbag. Now while wrapping the footbag complete a 360 degree spin towards the support leg. Eliminate any pauses between the initial inside delay and spin to get the move looking nice and smooth.

notation: CLIP > OP IN [DEX] > OP PINCHER [UNS] [DEL]
description: Eg. From a right clipper delay- pass the left leg over the footbag and twist your hips enabling your right leg to catch the footbag in a squeeze.

notation: CLIP > SAME BACK SWIRL [DEX] > SAME CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
description: Cross Body inside around the world. The BACK dexterity is performed by bringing the foot around the bag from the back and then up and over the top.

notation: SET > (no plant while) [BOD] OP OUT [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
description: Eg. From a right toe delay- jump hard off the support leg and circle the footbag from out to in quickly planting the left leg again. Scoop the footbag up before it hits the ground with the setting foot which never touches the ground.

notation: SET > OP IN [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
description: From either a clipper or a toe delay, set the footbag up- then with the support leg circle the footbag from the front up and over the footbag. Hop off of the original setting leg as you finish the dexterity and catch the bag on a clipper delay. It is easiest to point your toes down as you circle the bag because this makes it faster and less likely to snag the bag as you circle it.

notation: TOE > OP OUT [DEX] > OP OUT [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
description: An out to in Mirage followed by another out to in Mirage with the opposite leg - a reverse miraging reverse mirage. Eg. From a right toe delay, hopping off the left leg, bring the left leg around the bag from out to in to land to support an out to in mirage by the right foot ending on a left toe delay.

notation: TOE > OP OUT [DEX] > OP OUT [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL]
description: An atomic-set leg-over. E.g., from a right toe delay, hopping off the left leg, bring the left leg around the bag from out to in to land to support an out to in leg over by the right foot.

notation: TOE > OP OUT [DEX] > OP IN [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
description: Basically a reverse miraging mirage. Eg. From a right toe delay- hopping off the left leg- bring the left leg around the bag from out to in to land to support a right inside out mirage and finally the left leg completes the move by landing a left toe delay.

notation: TOE > OP OUT [DEX] > OP IN [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL]
description: A reverse miraging in to out legover. Eg. From a right toe delay- hopping off the left leg- bring the left leg around the bag from out to in to land to support a right in to out legover. *Scrambled simply means that the direction of the second dexterity is reversed.

notation: TOE > SAME OUT [DEX] > SAME OUT [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
description: Set from right toe. Quickly circle the bag from out to in twice. End the move by catching the bag on a left toe delay.

notation: TOE > SAME OUT [DEX] > SAME CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
description: from a left toe set, quickly circle the bag from out to in with the left foot. End the move by catching the bag on a left foot clipper.

notation: TOE > SAME OUT [DEX] > OP OUT [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
TOE > SAME OUT [DEX] > OP IN [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
TOE > SAME OUT [DEX] (plant) > SAME IN [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL]
TOE > SAME OUT [DEX] (plant) > SAME IN [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
CLIP > (front) SPIN [BOD] > OP OUT [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]orTOE > (front) SPIN [BOD] > SAME OUT [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
CLIP > (front) SPIN [BOD] > OP IN [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]orTOE > (front) SPIN [BOD] > SAME IN [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
TOE > SAME IN [DEX] > SAME IN [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL].
description: A double pixie. Eg. Set with right toe. Circle the footbag from in to out twice landing on a left toe delay.

notation: TOE > SAME IN [DEX] > OP OUT [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
description: Basically the reverse dexterity version of Smear (pixie mirage). Eg. Set the footbag with your right toe- execute a right leg in to out dexterity- then a left leg out to in dexterity- then delay the footbag on your right toe.

notation: TOE > SAME IN [DEX] > OP IN [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
description: Pixie the footbag straight to a mirage. E.g., from a right toe delay circle the footbag from in to out. Hop off the left leg and bring it around the footbag - from in to out - then hop off the right leg and toe delay the footbag on the setting leg.

notation: TOE > SAME IN [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
description: From a left toe set, perform a quick in to out dexterity with the setting leg. End by catching the bag on a right foot clipper.

notation: TOE > SAME IN [DEX] > SAME CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
description: From a left toe set, perform a quick in to out dexterity with the setting leg. End by catching the bag on a left foot clipper.

notation: TOE > SAME IN [DEX] (plant) > SAME OUT [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL]
TOE > SAME IN [DEX] (plant) > SAME OUT [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
description: From a right toe, perform a quick in to out dexterity (pixie) and touch the ground with your right foot. Then, come back around the bag from out to in ending on a left toe delay.

notation: CLIP > (NO PLANT WHILE) OP IN [DEX] > OP IN [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL]
TOE > OP IN [DEX] > OP OUT [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
description: Basically a miraging reverse mirage. Eg. Start from a right toe delay. Set the bag up and immediately start to bring your left leg up and over the bag from in to out. Plant your left leg and quickly jump off of your right leg to execute an out to in dexterity. End the move by catching the bag on your left toe.

notation: TOE > OP IN [DEX] > OP IN [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
description: Basically two consecutive in to out mirages. Eg. Right toe set- left leg in to out dexterity- right leg in to out dexterity- left toe delay.

notation: CLIP > (back) SPIN [BOD] > OP OUT [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL] or TOE > (back) SPIN [BOD] > SAME OUT [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL]
CLIP > (back) SPIN [BOD] > OP IN [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL] or TOE > (back) SPIN [BOD] > SAME IN [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL]
CLIP > (back) SPIN [BOD] > SAME OUT [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL] or TOE > (back) SPIN [BOD] > OP OUT [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
CLIP > (back) SPIN [BOD] > SAME OUT [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL] or TOE > (back) SPIN [BOD] > OP OUT [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL]
CLIP > (back) SPIN [BOD] > SAME IN [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL] or TOE > (back) SPIN [BOD] > OP IN [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
CLIP > (back) SPIN [BOD] > SAME IN [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL] or TOE > (back) SPIN [BOD] > OP IN [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL]
TOE > OP OUT [DEX] (plant) > SAME OUT [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
TOE > OP OUT [DEX] (plant) > SAME OUT [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL]
TOE > OP OUT [DEX] (plant) > SAME IN [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
description: Eg. From a right toe delay- set the bag straight up- then quickly bring your left leg over the bag from out to in- to tap the ground on the right side of the bag- before bringing the same leg back over the bag from in to out- ending on a right toe delay.

notation: CLIP > SAME OUT [DEX] > SAME OUT [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
description: From a clipper delay set- bring the setting leg straight from the clipper around the footbag from out to in twice. Hop off the support leg as your bring the setting leg down to a clipper delay with the support leg.

notation: SET > OP IN [DEX] > (back) SPIN [BOD] > SAME CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
description: A whirling osis. Begin like a whirl but then bail to an osis. Eg. From a right clipper delay- whirl over the footbag with the left leg but don't put it down- instead turn out of the move scooping the bag into a left osis.

notation: SET > SAME/OP OUT [DEX] > OP BACK SWIRL [DEX] > SAME CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
description: Same as butterfly delay except instead of just catching the footbag on a clipper- complete a cross body inside around the world (swirl) delay straight after the leg over.

notation: TOE > SAME IN/OUT [DEX] > SAME IN/OUT [DEX] > SAME HEEL [UNS] [DEL]
description: A double around the world ending in a heel delay.

notation: TOE > SAME OUT [DEX] > SAME OUT [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
description: From a toe delay circle the footbag from out to in twice and catch the footbag on the opposite leg clipper. Eg. From a right toe delay- set the bag straight up and circle the bag twice from out to in- hop off the left leg as your bring the right leg down and catch on a left leg clipper delay.

notation: CLIP > OP OUT [DEX] > SAME OUT [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
description: Two out-to-in dexterities in between 2 same-side clipper delays. Eg. Right clipper delay- set the bag straight up and circle it twice from out to in- then delay the footbag on your right clipper again.

notation: SET > OP OUT [DEX] > (back) SPIN [BOD] > SAME CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
description: Eg. a blender but the dexterity direction is the other way.

notation: CLIP > OP IN [DEX] > SAME IN [DEX] > SAME CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
description: Eg. From right clipper delay- quickly plant the right clipper and circle the bag from in to out twice with the left leg and then delay on the left clipper.

notation: INSIDE > (JUMP) [BOD] > OP SWIRL [DEX] > SAME CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
description: A hopping over inside around the world delay. Holding an inside delay close to the ground- the support leg jumps the suspended footbag as the other leg sets the footbag around 4 inches straight up and completes an inside around the world delay which results in ending in a clipper delay position.

notation: TOE > OP OUT [DEX] > OP SOLE [XBD] [UNS] [DEL]
description: Identical to a butterfly delay except catch the bag on a flapper delay instead of a clipper delay.

notation: SET > OP IN [DEX] > (JUMP) [BOD] > OP INSIDE [DEL] > OP OUT [DEX] > (LAND)
description: A mirage into an eclipse. Eg. Set the footbag from a right clipper and do an in to out dexterity with your left leg. Then jump and straight after initiate an inside delay. Bring the jumping leg over the delaying leg and back down to the ground.

notation: TOE > OP OUT [DEX] > SAME OUT [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
description: Same as double over down except set from one leg and circle with the other. Eg. From a right toe delay- set the bag across slightly and circle the bag twice from out to in with your left leg- hop off the right leg as your bring the left leg down and catch on a right leg clipper delay.

notation: CLIP > SAME IN [PDX] [DEX] > SAME IN [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
description: Eg. From a right foot clipper delay- circle the bag with the right foot from in to out twice then end on a left foot toe delay.

notation: CLIP > SAME IN [PDX] [DEX] > OP OUT [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL].
CLIP > SAME IN [PDX] [DEX] > OP IN [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
description: Eg. From a left foot clipper stall- bring the left leg around the support leg and around the bag from in to out completing the 'S' shape. Then hop off your right leg and bring it around the bag from in to out landing a left toe delay.

notation: CLIP > SAME IN [PDX] [DEX] > OP OUT [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL]
description: Eg. Set from a left foot clipper delay- do a left leg in to out dexterity- then a right leg out to in dexterity and catch the footbag on a right toe delay. This is a paradox mirage with an extra legover at the end.

notation: CLIP > SAME OUT [PDX] [DEX] > SAME CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
CLIP (plant) > (no plant while) SAME IN [PDX] [BOD] [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
description: Eg. Set the footbag from your right foot clipper and switch your support leg (raise your left leg as you plant the right foot). Then, without planting the left foot, hop off of the right leg bringing it up and over the bag from in to out ending on a left toe delay.

notation: CLIP > SAME IN [PDX] [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
description: A whirl delay that is set from one clipper delay and caught on the other. Set the bag so it moves across the front of your body and bring the setting leg from behind the support leg- and without putting this leg down- begin the whirl motion and end on a clipper using the other leg to do the delay.

notation: CLIP > SAME FRONT/BACK SWIRL [DEX] > SAME FRONT/BACK SWIRL [DEX] > SAME CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
description: Basically a double swirl. Eg. Set the bag on a right clipper- while in the cross body position, circle the footbag twice (in either direction) and catch it on the same side clipper delay.

notation: SET > (no plant while) OP IN [DEX] > OP OUT [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL]
description: Eg. From a right toe delay- jump with both legs going over the footbag and ending on another right toe delay. Note make sure both legs go over the footbag and you do not jump around the bag.

notation: SET > (no plant while) OP OUT [BOD] [DEX] > OP OUT [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL]
SET > (no plant while) OP OUT [BOD] [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
description: Identical to the symposium whirl delay but you circle the footbag the other way. Eg. From a right clipper delay jump hard off the left leg and bring it over the footbag from the back up and over without putting the right leg down. Land back on the left leg. The dexterity motion comes from the knee (as in a whirl), not from the hip (as in butterfly).

notation: SET > (no plant while) OP IN [BOD] [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
description: Identical to the whirl delay but you never put the setting leg down. Eg. From a right clipper delay jump hard off the left leg and bring it over the footbag from the front up and over without putting the right leg down. Land back on the left leg.

notation: TOE > SAME IN [DEX] > SAME IN [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
TOE > SAME IN [DEX] > SAME IN [DEX] > SAME CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
TOE > OP IN [DEX] > SAME IN [DEX] > SAME CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
TOE > OP IN [DEX] > SAME IN [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
SET > OP IN [DEX] > SAME IN [DEX] > SAME IN [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
description: A triple dexterity mirage.

notation: TOE > SAME IN/OUT [DEX] > SAME IN/OUT [DEX] > SAME IN/OUT [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL]
description: Circle the footbag three times inbetween toe delays.

notation: CLIP > SAME FRONT/BACK SWIRL [DEX] > (BACK) SPIN [BOD] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
description: A swirling osis where the swirl is done with the opposite leg as the osis. Similar to a dyno except the swirl is done with the other foot. Eg. From a right clipper delay complete an inside cross body around the world. Just as your leg is heading back down to the ground- hop off the left leg- turn out of the move scooping the bag into a left osis.

notation: CLIP > OP IN [DEX] > OP BACK SWIRL [DEX] > SAME CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
description: A whirl delay followed by a swirl. Eg. From a right clipper delay plant the right leg and bring the left leg over the bag from the front up and around to land this leg back in its original clipper position. After this leg has circled the bag and is racing to the ground hop off the right leg and complete an inside around the world before using this leg to finish on a clipper delay.

notation: SET > OP IN [DEX] > SAME IN [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
description: A double whirl. Eg. Right clipper set- circle the bag twice in the whirling direction- back to a right clipper delay.

notation: TOE > OP OUT [DEX] > OP IN [DEX] > SAME IN [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
description: A reverse miraging double mirage.

notation: TOE > OP OUT [DEX] > OP OUT [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
description: A reverse direction mirage before a butterfly delay. Eg. From a right toe set- do a left leg out to in mirage- then a butterfly ending in a left clipper.

notation: TOE > OP OUT [DEX] > (JUMP) [BOD] > OP INSIDE [DEL] > OP OUT [DEX] > (LAND)
TOE > OP OUT [DEX] > (FRONT) SPIN [BOD] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
TOE > OP OUT [DEX] > (no plant while) OP IN [DEX] > OP TOE
description: This move is a "backside symposium atom smasher" - an atom smasher where the second dexterity is symposium.

notation: CLIP > OP IN [DEX] > OP OUT [PDX] [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
description: Identical to the Blur delay except the second mirage dexterity is in the other direction Eg. From a right clipper delay- quickly bring the left leg over the bag from in to out. As you put the left leg down hop off the right leg and bring it around the bag from out to in. Now hop off the leg left and catch the bag on a left toe delay.

notation: CLIP > OP IN [DEX] > OP IN [PDX] [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
description: A mirage into a paradox mirage. Eg. From a right clipper bring the left leg over the footbag to the ground simultaneously bringing the right leg around the footbag from in to out- just before planting the right leg hop off the left leg and catch the footbag on a left toe delay.

notation: SET > (DUCK) [BOD] > SAME/OP OUT [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
description: Eg. Right clipper delay- duck the bag- right dexterity from out to in to a left clipper delay.

notation: SET > DUCK [BOD] > SAME or OP OSIS [BOD] [XBD] [DEL]
description: Set the footbag just over your head. Duck under the bag. Complete the move with either osis.

notation: TOE > SAME OUT [DEX] > OP OUT [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL].
TOE > SAME OUT [DEX] > OP IN [DEX] > OP OUT [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL]
TOE > SAME OUT [DEX] (plant) > SAME IN [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
TOE > SAME OUT [DEX] > (back) SPIN [BOD] > SAME OUT [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL]
TOE > SAME OUT [DEX] > (back) SPIN [BOD] > OP IN [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
TOE > SAME OUT [DEX] > (NO PLANT WHILE) OP IN [BOD] [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
TOE > SAME OUT [DEX] > OP IN [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
CLIP > OP IN [DEX] > SAME IN [DEX] > OP OUT [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL]
description: This is a leg over straight after a barrage. Eg. From a right clipper stall plant the right leg quickly- hop off the left leg and bring it around the footbag from in to out twice. Then hop off the right leg as you bring the left leg down- bringing the right leg over the top of the footbag to land a right toe delay.

notation: CLIP > (back) SPIN [BOD] > SAME OUT [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]or TOE > (back) SPIN [BOD] > OP OUT [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
description: Eg. From a right clipper- let the bag pass behind your back and without putting the right leg down turn to the right and complete a butterfly delay.

notation: CLIP > (back) SPIN [BOD] > SAME IN [DEX] > SAME CLIP [XBD] [DEL]or TOE > (back) SPIN [BOD] > OP IN [DEX] > SAME CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
description: Eg. From a right clipper- let the bag pass behind your back and without putting the right leg down turn to the right and complete a drifter.

notation: CLIP > (front) SPIN [BOD] > OP OUT [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]orTOE > (front) SPIN [BOD] > SAME OUT [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
CLIP > (front) SPIN [BOD] > SAME OUT [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]orTOE > (front) SPIN [BOD] > OP OUT [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
CLIP > (front) SPIN [BOD] > SAME OUT [PDX] [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]orTOE > (front) SPIN [BOD] > OP OUT [PDX] [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
CLIP > (front) SPIN [BOD] > SAME IN [PDX] [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]orTOE > (front) SPIN [BOD] > OP IN [PDX] [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
TOE > SAME IN [DEX] > OP IN [DEX] > SAME CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
TOE > SAME IN [DEX] > OP IN [DEX] > OP OUT [DEX] > SAME TOE [DEL]
description: Like a smear but with an extra legover at the end.

notation: TOE > SAME IN [DEX] (JUMP) [BOD] > SAME INSIDE [DEL] > OP OUT [DEX] > (LAND)
TOE > SAME IN [DEX] (plant) > OP OUT [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL].
TOE > SAME IN [DEX] (plant) > SAME OUT [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
TOE > SAME IN [DEX] > SAME/OP BACK SWIRL [DEX] > SAME CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
description: Eg. Right toe set- circle the footbag with your right leg from in to out- hop to the right and do a right leg swirl- coming from the back- up and over the bag- landing on a right clipper delay.

notation: TOE > SAME IN [DEX] > (no plant while) OP IN [BOD] [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
TOE > SAME IN [DEX] > OP IN [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
CLIP > (no plant while) OP IN [DEX] > OP IN [DEX] [BOD] > OP TOE [DEL]
description: Eg. From a right clipper set the footbag around waist height and without putting the right leg down jump over the bag with the left leg. Then bring the right leg around the footbag from in to out then land on the right leg. Finally catch the footbag on a left toe.

notation: TOE > OP IN [DEX] (plant) > OP OUT [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
TOE > OP IN [DEX] > OP IN [DEX] > SAME CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
TOE > OP IN [DEX] > (no plant while) OP OUT [BOD] [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
TOE > OP IN [DEX] > (no plant while) OP IN [BOD] [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
TOE > OP IN [DEX] > OP IN [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
CLIP > (back) SPIN [BOD] > OP OUT [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]orTOE > (back) SPIN [BOD] > SAME OUT [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]

From a right clipper delay- set the bag straight up and turn to the right letting the footbag pass behind your back. Without putting the left down hop off the right leg and simultaneously bring this leg over the footbag from out to in and catch the footbag in a left clipper delay.

description: Basically a blurry double switch. Eg. From a right clipper delay- quickly plant the right leg and bring the left leg over the bag as you hop off the right leg. Bring the right leg around the bag from out to in twice ending on a right toe delay.

notation: CLIP > OP IN [DEX] > OP OUT [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]

notation: CLIP > OP IN [DEX] > OP OUT [DEX] > OP CLIP [XBD] [DEL]
